name: mcp-faster-caller
description: Resolve concise aliases into structured MCP server calls.

interface.shortDescription: Route concise requests to MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Parse bilingual MCP aliases for GitHub, databases, browsers, web search, documentation, images, and PDFs, then route requests to the matching MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use the GitHub MCP tools for this request.
Query the database through the configured MCP server.
Route this browser task to the appropriate MCP tools.
